oracle.disclaimerCard: This result is entertainment content, not investment advice or a recommendation. Every decision and its consequences are yours alone.

cooldown.help: Each oracle stretches the next wait a little. Instant draws: {n} a day (resets at midnight).
cooldown.exhausted: Out of instant draws for today. They refill at midnight.

ad.title: Get it now
ad.desc: Wait just a moment and skip the cooldown to get your oracle right now.

accuracy.disclaimer: * A for-fun stat tracking whether the direction was right versus the price at oracle time. Unrelated to real returns — the octopus's oracle is basically a coin flip.
